heading: COMPUTATION OF RETIRED PAY
label: 945 COMPUTATION OF RETIRED PAY
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 945, consisting of sections 9711 to 9713, related to disposition of effects of deceased persons, prior to renumbering as chapter 975 of this title.

Amendments2018—, (e)(1), , , redesignated chapter 871 of this title as this chapter and items 8991 and 8992 as 9361 and 9362, respectively.Pub. L. 115–232, div. A, title VIII, § 806(d)(3)(B)(ii)132 Stat. 1833Aug. 13, 2018

children.heading: Recomputation of retired pay to reflect advancement on retired list
